title: Post by sdcaw_spirituality
description:
Nikola Tesla said 3–6–9 was the key to the universe — and manifestation. ⚡️

It’s not magic; it’s mental engineering. 

Write your intention 3x in the morning, 6x in the afternoon, 9x at night — with emotion and consistency — and your brain begins to treat it as truth.

The brain can’t tell repeated imagination from reality. When you feel it, you attract it.

Ready to test Tesla’s code?

Comment MANIFEST below for The Power of Visualization — a neuroscience-backed guide to mastering the 369 method and turning intention into reality.

.
